headline: 3 Reasons TSN is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Tyson Foods has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 22.2%. The stock now trades at $64.98, marking a 24.7% gain. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: 91-year-old food manufacturer closes facility, lays off 168
summary: Rising beef prices have been spurred by a continuing decline in the U.S. beef cattle herd, with the total cattle and calf count reaching a 75-year low of 86.2 million head, down from 86.5 million a year ago, according to U.S. Department of Agriculture data reported by the Texas Farm Bureau. headline: Mama's Creations Q4 Earnings on Deck: What Should Investors Expect?
summary: Mama's Creations eyes sharp Q4 gains as revenues are seen up 62.9% and EPS up 25% ahead of April 14 results.
